SystemExit: 0
SystemExit: 42
SystemExit: error message
caught GeneratorExit
GeneratorExit not caught by Exception
caught KeyboardInterrupt
KeyboardInterrupt not caught by Exception
FloatingPointError as ArithmeticError: fp error
BufferError: buf err
caught MemoryError
UnboundLocalError as NameError: x before assignment
ModuleNotFoundError: True
ModuleNotFoundError as ImportError: True
FileExistsError as OSError: already exists
PermissionError: denied
TimeoutError: timed out
IsADirectoryError: is a dir
NotADirectoryError: not a dir
InterruptedError: interrupted
BlockingIOError: blocking
ChildProcessError: child
ProcessLookupError: no process
BrokenPipeError as ConnectionError: broken pipe
ConnectionAbortedError as OSError: aborted
ConnectionRefusedError: refused
ConnectionResetError as OSError: reset
SyntaxError: bad syntax
IndentationError as SyntaxError: bad indent
TabError as IndentationError: mixed tabs
SystemError: internal
ReferenceError: dead weakref
UnicodeError as ValueError: unicode error
UnicodeDecodeError: UnicodeDecodeError
UnicodeEncodeError: UnicodeEncodeError
UnicodeTranslateError: UnicodeTranslateError
DeprecationWarning as Warning: deprecated
UserWarning as Exception: user warn
RuntimeWarning: runtime warn
BytesWarning: bytes warn
